Requirements mention Supabase/activity-log persistence; current code exposes API/domain TypeScript types and mock services, but no database schema in repo.
AI/context metadata exists as optional domain/API fields; RS-R7 must verify manifestation coverage before marking AI-ready requirements implemented.
ApiAssignedMember role is a plain string and does not yet encode the full PR-* permission taxonomy as typed policy.

C-03: 'Ready' is NOT terminal for MVP; a later state exists. RV-005 stays proposed; opened QST-LIFECYCLE-POST-READY (post-Ready state name; cannot be forbidden values per core.md §14).

Adopt full v0.1.4 keyboard + copy/paste set for MVP (Ctrl+A/C/V, Ctrl+S, Delete, Esc-deselect + multi-select copy/paste). Promoted REQ-KEY-001, REQ-KEY-002, REQ-KEY-003, REQ-KEY-004, REQ-KEY-005, REQ-KEY-006, REQ-KEY-007, REQ-SBC-DES-001, REQ-SBC-DUP-001 to approved/po-decided.
QST-VR-011 resolved: DCX access implies edit rights except where version-status locks prevent editing. R7 persist pass to derive REQ-VR-011 from this ruling.

source: RS-R7 confirmation analysis (PO asked to close R7)
signoff_text: R7 candidate links NOT auto-confirmed — auto-accept is unsafe.
reason: Confirmation analysis found the RS-R7 inference too low-precision to rubber-stamp: (1) 126 source files have DUPLICATE MAN nodes (inventory created one by component-name + one by src-path); (2) all 362 candidate 'implements' links carry a FLAT 0.85 confidence (no real signal); (3) heavy over-linking / false positives (Select.tsx 'implements' 23 reqs incl FCS-002; mock-store 25; types/api 23). Auto-confirming would cement wrong traces + duplicate nodes. DECISION: defer confirmation; prerequisites = (a) dedupe MAN nodes by source path, (b) replace name-similarity inference with import/usage-based evidence (reuse code-index component-usages) or targeted curation, then confirm. R7 stays persisted-but-not-confirmed; R8 verification remains gated.
Normalize duplicate RS-R7 manifestation identities before PO mapping confirmation.

signoff_text: Build the full system as planned, but operate it in calibration mode until repeated real-world use proves its accuracy. Treat graph data as authoritative planning context, while allowing investigation, correction, and deferred cleanup where confidence is low.
reason: Preserve strict requirements-system architecture while preventing rollout mapping imperfections from blocking sprint progress or authorizing uncontrolled src/** changes.
